Class Contract.OriginalVariables

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract.OriginalVariables
Enclosing interface:
Contract
public static final class Contract.OriginalVariables extends Object
Class for storing the original variables without always distinguishing several different cases depending on which variables are present/needed in order to provide a general interface. At the moment only used for well-definedness checks (as those refer to already existing structures).

    • OriginalVariables

      public OriginalVariables(LocationVariable selfVar, LocationVariable resVar, LocationVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> atPreVars, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars)
      Create new instance of original variables
      Parameters:
      selfVar - the original self variable
      resVar - the original result variable
      excVar - the original exception variable
      atPreVars - the original atPreVars
      paramVars - the original parameter variables

    • add

      public Contract.OriginalVariables add(ImmutableList<LocationVariable> newParams)

      newParams -
      Returns:
      the changed original variables
